title: Is it possible to change the color of the tab of the currently open view?
excerpt:
I have created multiple board views, but it is difficult to know which view I have open when using them. 
Is it possible to change the color of the tab of the currently open view?

posts.author: monomono (Moe Nomura)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have created multiple board views, but it is difficult to know which view I have open when using them.
Is it possible to change the color of the tab of the currently open view?

posts.author: GeorgeBaker (George Baker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Unfortunately it is not, I’ve checked.

This would be a great QOL feature though; You should consider making a feature request about it!

posts.author: monomono (Moe Nomura)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you very much!
I have requested the feature, please VOTE!

Change the color of the tabs in the currently open view Feature requests
I have created multiple board views, but it is difficult to know which view I have open when using them. Please implement a function to identify which view is currently open, such as changing the color of the tab of the currently open view.

posts.author: GeorgeBaker (George Baker)
posts.cookedHtml: I voted! I hope it gets implemented!
